prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年四川农业大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约38050→41723→47689→63234→64571名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约26500名，其中2023→2024年跳升约15500名最为显著，2025年仅小幅后移约1300名，显示位次下行趋势有所放缓但尚未企稳；2025年基准位次约64571名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2024年稳定在110–112人，2025年增至119人，2026年进一步扩至143人，较2025年扩招约20.2%，为近年最大增幅；扩招意味着录取名额显著增加，在报考热度不变的情况下将推动最低录取位次后移（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第134–141名区间（2026年排名134），属于中后段211院校，层次定位清晰，对考生吸引力相对稳定；该校近年声誉评价以中性偏正面为主（2023年食堂服务获正面评价）；抖音综合热度排名第86位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未见明显报考热度升温信号；2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降的舆情关注，但后续影响已趋平稳；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A、作物学获评A-，为该校核心优势学科；与招生专业中的动物科学、动物医学、农学、种子科学与工程等直接对应，对农林类方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，而农林类、生化环材等专业热度一般或明显劝退；该校招生专业以农林类为主，整体专业热度对报考的拉动作用有限；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移的大趋势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招约20%（推动位次后移）、山东省考生规模增加约5.7%（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉热度平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年64571名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约72885名，波动区间72385–73385名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约72885名，区间72385–73385名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主力填报（如动物医学、能源与动力工程、农学等），一档专业（法学、会计学、物联网工程等）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（动物科学、食品科学与工程、园艺等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<72385名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>73385名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sichuan Agricultural University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 38050 → 41723 → 47689 → 63234 → 64571, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 26500 places in the past 4 years. The most significant jump occurred from 2023 to 2024, with an increase of about 15500 places, while in 2025 there was only a small backward shift of about 1300 places, indicating that the downward trend in rankings has slowed but not yet stabilized. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 64571. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong's comprehensive category was stable at 110–112 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 119 in 2025, and further expanded to 143 in 2026, an increase of about 20.2% compared to 2025, the largest increase in recent years. Expansion means a significant increase in admission slots, which, under unchanged application enthusiasm, will push the minimum admission ranking backward (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the range of 134–141 in recent years (ranked 134 in 2026), placing it in the mid-to-late tier of 211 universities, with a clear positioning and relatively stable appeal to candidates. The university's reputation evaluation in recent years has been mainly neutral to slightly positive (in 2023, the cafeteria service received positive reviews). Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 86th (rated as 'average'), indicating a low-to-medium level of exposure on short video platforms, with no clear signs of increased application enthusiasm. In 2022, there was public attention on the declining admission cutoffs, but the subsequent impact has stabilized. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science received an A rating, and Crop Science received an A- rating, which are the university's core advantageous disciplines. These directly correspond to the admission majors such as Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy, and Seed Science and Engineering, attracting some candidates interested in agriculture and forestry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data on major popularity in 2026 shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while majors in agriculture, forestry, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials have average popularity or are clearly discouraged. The university's admission majors are mainly in agriculture and forestry, so the overall popularity of majors has limited pull on applications. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to about 681,000 in 2025, and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by about 20% (pushing rankings backward), the increase in the number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% (intensifying competition), and the stable reputation and popularity of the university, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move backward from the 2025 ranking of 64571. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 72885, with a fluctuation range of 72385–73385.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 72885, with a range of 72385–73385. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the predicted range focus on Tier 2 majors as their main choices (such as Veterinary Medicine, Energy and Power Engineering, Agronomy, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Internet of Things Engineering, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Animal Science, Food Science and Engineering, Horticulture, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<72385) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; those with rankings close to the upper limit (>73385) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
